title: Odyssey, Book 2: Telemachus Sets Sail
description: Book 2 of Homer's Odyssey: Telemachus Sets Sail.
introduction: Book 2 of the Odyssey: Telemachus Sets Sail. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.text: When early-born, rosy-fingered Dawn appeared, Telemachus called an assembly of the Ithacans. He denounced the suitors who devoured his father's wealth and courted his mother Penelope. Athena, disguised as Mentor, helped him fit out a ship. He sailed at nightfall for Pylos.
